content.question: The magnitude and geographic distribution of school closures in rural settlements through 2040 are not modeled or projected in accessible national planning documents; no published scenario analysis quantifies how many village schools are at high closure risk within 5, 10, or 15 years.
content.reduction_path: Directorate of Public Education, KSH, or Ministry of Education publication of a disaggregated closure-risk model projecting school viability by settlement size, district, and pupil cohort trends through 2040.
